# `docs/templates/`

This folder holds *pointers* to the canonical course templates — not copies. Templates evolve in the course repo; copying them here would mean your portfolio drifts out of date.

## Where to find the canonical templates

- **Memo template:** `courses/BUS-629-VEMBA-International-Corporate-Finance/_templates/` in the course repo, or the cross-course `docs/templates/template-memo.md`
- **Spec template:** `docs/templates/template-spec.md` in the course repo
- **Bio template:** `docs/templates/portfolio/bio-template.md`
- **Resume template:** `docs/templates/portfolio/resume-template.md`

## When to add files here

If you create a *personal* template (e.g., a custom checklist you use across stages), drop it here and link to it from the relevant stage README.
